REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS ROSA PARSONS AND DOUGLAS PARSONS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ALL CAUSES OF ACTION IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS H. PARSONS AND ROSA PARSONS PURSUANT TO CCP 437(C) IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACTS REGARDING EXISTENCE OF A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP BASED ON RATIFICATION OF THE LEASE ENTERED INTO BY IRENE AND P; AND BY FAILING TO ADDRESS THE DISCRIMINATION AGAINST PLAINTIFF BY IRENE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 437(C). ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set February 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Defendant Rosa Parsons, Douglas Parsons Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of All Causes Of Action In Favor Of Defendants Douglas H. Parsons And Rosa Parsons Pursuant To Ccp 437(C)
Off Calendar Sep-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cristina Garcia (415-421-2800) of Dolan Law Firm for Plaintiff/opposing party Charlene Hastings.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Rosa Parsons and Douglas Parsons' Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of All Causes Of Action In Favor Of Defendants Douglas H. Parsons And Rosa Parsons Pursuant To CCP 437(C) is DENIED. Triable issues of material facts regarding existence of a landlord-tenant relationship based on ratification of the lease entered into by Irene and P; and by failing to address the discrimination against Plaintiff by Irene. Plaintiff to prepare order in accordance with CCP 437(c). Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of All Causes Of Action In Favor Of Defendants Douglas H. Parsons And Rosa Parsons Pursuant To Ccp 437(C)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS ROSA PARSONS, DOUGLAS PARSONS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of All Causes Of Action In Favor Of Defendants Douglas H. Parsons And Rosa Parsons Pursuant To Ccp 437(C). The motion will be heard at 9:30 am in department 501, the real property/housing court, on September 22, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176, geales@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
